extension.summary: Stream Cinema recently added movies sorted by CSFD rating
Filmy zo Stream Cinema zoradene podla CSFD
Filmy ze Stream Cinema serazene podle CSFD
extension.description: Loads recently added Stream Cinema movies, matches them against CSFD, enriches them with rating, votes, plot and reviews, then sorts the list in a CSFD-style order.
Nacita nove filmy zo Stream Cinema, sparuje ich s CSFD, doplni hodnotenie, hlasy, obsah a recenzie a potom ich zoradi v style CSFD menu.
Nacte nove filmy ze Stream Cinema, sparuje je s CSFD, doplni hodnoceni, hlasy, obsah a recenze a potom je seradi ve stylu CSFD menu.
